android.title: Android Capability Notes
android.body: This build ships the Android shell, LAN auto-discovery, basic pairing, and diagnostics export. QR pairing, the real upload queue, background reconnection, and incremental sync have not yet been ported to the Android native engine.

subscription.restoreDesc: Check purchase history from App Store

myDevice.label: My Device Name
myDevice.hint: This name will be shown on your PC.
myDevice.lockedHint: A transfer is in progress, device name can't be changed right now.

photoPermission.title: Photo Access Is Off
photoPermission.body: Allow access to Photos to keep auto-sync running.

rows.diagnosticsDesc: Send logs and device status for troubleshooting

confirm.title: Upload diagnostics
confirm.message: Briefly describe the issue you ran into (e.g. upload stuck, team shared folder not loading). We'll bundle current runtime state along with your note and send it to the Vivi Drop support team.

failure.toast: Upload failed, please try again later

tooLarge.toast: Diagnostic bundle too large, please contact support

giftCard.desc: Enter gift card code to unlock trial

modal.title: Redeem gift card
modal.message: Enter a gift card code to activate or extend your subscription.

success.title: Redeemed
success.body: {{plan}} has been applied to your account.

failure.title: Redeem failed
failure.body: Gift card redemption failed. Please try again later.
failure.invalidCode: This gift card code is invalid. Check it and try again.
failure.notAvailable: This gift card is no longer available or has already been fully redeemed.
failure.alreadyRedeemed: This account has already redeemed this gift card.
failure.planMismatch: This gift card plan can't be applied to the current account.
failure.invalidOperation: The gift card redemption details are invalid. Check them and try again.
failure.activeSubscription: This account already has an active subscription and can't use a gift card.
failure.network: Network connection failed. Check your connection and try again.

actions.switchDeviceDesc: Disconnect current device and connect to another computer

switchDeviceWhileUploading.title: Upload in Progress
switchDeviceWhileUploading.body: An upload is currently running. Switching devices will interrupt it. Continue?

resetSync.title: Reset All Sync State
resetSync.body: This clears all sync records and disconnects the current device. You will need to re-enter a pairing code. Photos on your phone and Mac will not be deleted.

forgetDesktop.title: Forget Desktop
forgetDesktop.body: Are you sure you want to forget and disconnect from the desktop "{{name}}"? This will clear local connection records and binding state.

logout.title: Log Out
logout.body: Are you sure you want to log out?

exportUnavailable.title: Cannot Export
exportUnavailable.body: This build does not support exporting the diagnostics bundle.

exportFailed.title: Export Failed
exportFailed.body: Failed to export the diagnostics bundle. Please try again later.

languageSaveFailed.title: Cannot Change Language
languageSaveFailed.body: Failed to save the language setting. Please try again later.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.body: This permanently deletes your account, every sign-in method, and all usage history. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.confirmAgainBody: This is your final confirmation. Deleted data cannot be recovered.

remoteWake.title: Remote Wake
remoteWake.lanStatusNotCached: No LAN wake targets cached. Connect once on same LAN to cache.
remoteWake.autoReadyBody: Remote wake still requires router Wake-on-WAN or UDP forwarding. Vivi Drop automatically applies the current public endpoint and suggested port; adjust them below if your router uses different forwarding.
remoteWake.autoMissingTitle: Desktop wake details not collected yet
remoteWake.autoMissingBody: Connect the phone and desktop once on the same Wi-Fi. Vivi Drop will cache the MAC address, broadcast address, and suggested port automatically.
remoteWake.enableHint: When enabled, opening My Computer from an external network will try remote wake first. If the router is not configured, the desktop may still not wake.
remoteWake.wowHostPlaceholder: e.g., DDNS domain or public IP
remoteWake.invalidHost: Please enter a valid host or IP address
remoteWake.invalidPort: Please enter a valid port number (1-65535)

global.editDeviceDesc: This name will be shown for this device in the sync history.
global.errorDeviceNameSave: Failed to save, please try again later
global.logoutDesc: Are you sure you want to log out of the current account?
global.errorLogout: Failed to log out, please try again later.
global.restorePurchaseDesc: Checking your purchase history from the App Store.
global.restoreSuccess: Subscription restored and membership status refreshed.
global.restoreNotFound: No restorable subscription found; membership status refreshed.
global.restoreNotSupported: Restoring purchases is not supported on this platform; membership status refreshed.
global.restoreFailed: Failed to restore purchases, please try again later.
global.deleteAccountDesc: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
global.errorDeleteAccount: Failed to delete account, please try again later.
global.uploadDiagnosticsDesc: Please briefly describe the issue you encountered to help us troubleshoot.
global.uploadSuccessMsg: Diagnostics bundle uploaded. Thank you for your feedback!
global.uploadFailureMsg: An error occurred while uploading the diagnostics bundle. Please check your network and try again.
